update_instructions: When model specs change (new context windows, new models, deprecated models), update this file and bump last_updated. The plugin reads this file as the single source of truth for all model data.

claude-opus-4-6.cot_approach: Built-in. Use 'think thoroughly' + effort parameter. Do NOT use 'think step by step'.

claude-sonnet-4-6.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps. Use 'think thoroughly before responding'.

claude-haiku-4-5.cot_approach: Keep simple and direct. Less capable at complex reasoning chains.
claude-haiku-4-5.key_constraint: Keep prompts simple — less capable reasoning

gpt-4.1.cot_approach: Explicit 'Think step by step' needed — does NOT default to reasoning.
gpt-4.1.few_shot: Separate # Examples section with input/output pairs
gpt-4.1.key_constraint: Follows instructions LITERALLY — implicit intent is ignored. Use sandwich method.

gpt-4o.few_shot: Separate # Examples section with input/output pairs

gpt-5.cot_approach: Improved reasoning but explicit CoT still helps on complex tasks.
gpt-5.key_constraint: Check current docs for updated limits

o1.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add CoT. It HURTS performance.
o1.key_constraint: Use developer messages, not system messages

o3.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add CoT. It HURTS performance.
o3.key_constraint: Use developer messages. Add 'Formatting re-enabled' if markdown needed.

o4-mini.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add CoT. It HURTS performance.
o4-mini.key_constraint: Use developer messages. reasoning_effort param controls depth.

gemini-2.5-pro.cot_approach: 'Plan before responding' for complex tasks. Add self-critique.
gemini-2.5-pro.key_constraint: Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Consistency in formatting mandatory.

gemini-2.5-flash.key_constraint: Temperature MUST stay at 1.0. Fast but less capable than Pro.

gemini-3.cot_approach: Thinking mode available — treat as reasoning-native when enabled.

llama-4.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helps. 'Let's work through this step by step.'
llama-4.key_constraint: Wrong special tokens silently degrade output

llama-3.key_constraint: Context varies by deployment (8K-128K). Be more explicit than Claude/GPT.

mistral-large.key_constraint: Less precise instruction following — avoid subtle instructions

mixtral.key_constraint: MoE model — fast but may show inconsistency

deepseek-r1.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add explicit CoT. Reasoning is internal.
deepseek-r1.key_constraint: Reasoning-native model. Treat like o-series for technique selection. Strong at math and analysis.

deepseek-v3.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. 'Think step by step' works well.
deepseek-v3.key_constraint: MoE architecture. Strong at code and analysis. Markdown format preferred.

grok-2.key_constraint: xAI API. Less restrictive content policies. Integrated with X/Twitter.

grok-3.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. May have reasoning mode — verify.
grok-3.key_constraint: xAI flagship. Verify current specs — may have reasoning variant.

qwen-2.5.key_constraint: Open-weight. Strong multilingual (especially CJK). Multiple sizes: 0.5B-72B.

qwen-2.5-coder.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful for complex code tasks.
qwen-2.5-coder.key_constraint: Code-specialized. Open-weight. Top-tier on code benchmarks.

qwq-32b.cot_approach: BUILT-IN. Do NOT add explicit CoT.
qwq-32b.key_constraint: Reasoning model similar to o1. Open-weight 32B. Treat like o-series.

command-r-plus.key_constraint: Strong at RAG workflows. Native citation/grounding. Enterprise-focused.

jamba-1.5.key_constraint: SSM-Transformer hybrid (Mamba). 256K context. Efficient long-context processing.

amazon-nova-pro.key_constraint: AWS Bedrock. Multimodal (text, image, video). 300K context.

phi-4.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful. Strong reasoning for its size.
phi-4.key_constraint: 14B params. Punches above weight class at math/reasoning. Open-weight.

yi-lightning.key_constraint: Fast inference. Chinese/English bilingual. Open-weight versions available.

codestral.cot_approach: Explicit CoT helpful for complex code tasks.

sonar-pro.cot_approach: Not applicable — search-augmented, not raw reasoning.
sonar-pro.key_constraint: Always web-grounded with citations. Not a standalone LLM — search-augmented wrapper.

dall-e-3.key_constraint: Natural language prompts (not keyword lists). No negative prompts. Content policy restrictions.

midjourney-v6.key_constraint: Discord/web. Params: --ar, --v, --style raw, --chaos, --no. Front-load important terms.

stable-diffusion-3.5.key_constraint: Open-weight. Requires negative prompt. Weight syntax: (term:1.5). LoRA support.

flux-1-pro.key_constraint: From ex-Stability AI founders. Strong text rendering. Natural language prompts preferred over keywords.

ideogram-2.key_constraint: Best-in-class text rendering in images. Strong at typography and logos.

nano-banana.key_constraint: Image gen model available on use.ai, Higgsfield, and others. Natural language prompts. Supports style presets.

nano-banana-2.key_constraint: Updated version of Nano Banana. Improved coherence and quality. Natural language prompts.

nano-banana-pro.key_constraint: Pro tier of Nano Banana. Higher fidelity output. Available across use.ai, Higgsfield, and similar platforms.

seedream-4.5.key_constraint: ByteDance Seed image gen. DiT architecture. Strong bilingual (Chinese/English) prompt understanding. High aesthetic quality.

flux-2-pro.key_constraint: Successor to Flux 1 Pro. Improved coherence, text rendering, prompt adherence. API-accessible. Natural language prompts.

flux-2-flex.key_constraint: Flex variant optimized for image-to-image, inpainting, and control conditioning. Versatile input modes.

flux-2-max.key_constraint: Top-tier Flux variant. Highest output fidelity and largest model. Best quality at cost of speed.

imagen-3.key_constraint: Vertex AI and Gemini integration. Photorealistic quality. Google's flagship image model.

runway-gen3.key_constraint: Text/image-to-video. Industry leader for creative video. API available.

seedance-2.key_constraint: Text/image-to-video. Up to 2 min at 1080p. Multi-shot storytelling with subject consistency. Synced audio/dialogue/lip-sync in 8+ languages.

elevenlabs.key_constraint: Premium TTS/voice cloning. Most natural-sounding synthesis. Multilingual. API available.

suno-v4.key_constraint: Text-to-music. Full songs with vocals. Prompt: lyrics + genre/style description.
